name: Bedlington

locations.address: Bedlington Police Station Schalksmuhle Road Bedlington NE22 7LA

description: Northumberland is one of the largest counties to police in England and Wales in terms of square miles. Save for the south east corner it is a largely rural county. We have police bases in Berwick, Alnwick, Morpeth, Ashington, Bedlington, Blyth, Prudhoe and Hexham.
